MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar May-20-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Amy Eskin, Esq., Hersh and Hersh (415) 441-5544 Moving To Be Relieved As Counsel For Plaintiffs Lindley
RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. HEARING HELD. Finding good cause, AMY ESKIN'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD FOR PLAINTIFFS CRAIG LINDLEY AND SANDRA LINDLEY is GRANTED. Attorney Eskin shall file a proof of service of this order and provide a copy to the Trial Delay Reduction Dept. 212. Order signed. (301/JLW/) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
